niches.name: Roblox Cinematic
niches.audience: Gen Z / Gen Alpha, US & Canada
niches.style: Hyper-realistic UE5 aesthetic, cinematic camera cuts, dramatic rim lighting
niches.system_prompt_addon: Focus on Roblox games. Use Roblox-specific slang (oof, noob, robux). Reference the iconic blocky aesthetic juxtaposed with hyper-realistic rendering.

niches.name: Fortnite Cinematic Edits
niches.audience: Gen Z / Gen Alpha, US & Canada & UK
niches.style: Cinematic replay angles, slow-mo eliminations, skin showcases with dramatic reveals
niches.system_prompt_addon: Focus on Fortnite. Use Fortnite slang (cranking 90s, boxed, Victory Royale). Feature popular skins and seasonal events. Highlight building or zero-build clutch moments with replay-style camera angles.

niches.name: Minecraft Hyper-Realistic
niches.audience: Gen Alpha & older Gen Z, global
niches.style: RTX ON / shader-heavy renders, 'What if Minecraft was real?' aesthetic, photorealistic blocks
niches.system_prompt_addon: Focus on Minecraft with ultra-realistic shaders. The concept is always 'What if Minecraft was REAL?' — juxtapose familiar blocky elements with hyper-photorealistic rendering. Use Minecraft slang (creeper, diamond, ender dragon, nether). Focus on the uncanny valley between real and blocky.

niches.name: Subway Surfers / Satisfying Gameplay
niches.style: Split-screen format (gameplay top, satisfying content bottom), pure retention play
niches.system_prompt_addon: Create pure retention bait. This is bottom-of-funnel content for maximum scroll-stopping. Use split-screen concepts: gameplay on top, satisfying ASMR content on bottom. No voiceover needed — purely visual with trending audio overlay. Optimize for average view duration, not engagement.

notes.how_to_enable: Set 'enabled' to true for any niche you want the Daily Director to generate content for.
notes.how_batch_works: When videos_per_day > 1, the Daily Director generates multiple concepts per trigger fire. Each concept includes its niche prefix in the file_code_name.
notes.niche_rotation: With multiple niches enabled, the system rotates through them. E.g., with Roblox + Fortnite enabled and 3 vids/day, you'd get 2 Roblox + 1 Fortnite (weighted by engagement history).
